name: Edie Adams
description: American actress, comedian, singer, and businesswoman (1927–2008)
abstract: Edie Adams (born Edith Elizabeth Enke; April 16, 1927 – October 15, 2008) was an American comedian, actress, singer and businesswoman who was prominent in the second half of the 1900s. She earned a Tony Award and was nominated for an Emmy Award.

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Duffy Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: My father and I were appearing with Edie Adams and her husband Pete Candoli at the time
about_quotes.doc_title: Duffy Jackson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 17, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Shew
about_quotes.evidence: Edie Adams bought the whole club out one night for her personal friends.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Shew interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 1, 2020
